Default Prove-Up On Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On September 19,2002.
Off Calendar Sep-20-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for default prove-ip hearing. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Lewis Gillian. Daniel Lee. Chief Financial Officer of Linuxcare was sworn and examined. Good cause appearintg, the court sign judgment as follows: Principal: $82,000.00; Costs: $246.00; Interest: $15,100.40; Attorney Fees: $5,000.00 for a total judgment of $102,346.40. Judgment signed in open court.
